todo.title: Design system: foundations
todo.description: Create a mission-control design system (colors, typography, spacing, tokens) and implement a ThemeProvider in the app.
acceptance: Color tokens added (accent, background, surface, muted)
Typography tokens and base font loaded (Inter)
ThemeProvider applies tokens site-wide and supports dark/light

todo.title: Polish UI cards component
todo.description: Create a reusable Card component (surface, shadow, padding) and replace existing ad-hoc card markup on Dashboard/Tasks/Office.
acceptance: Card component available in /components and used in Dashboard, Tasks, Office
Matches Jarvis theme (glass gradient, subtle neon accent)

todo.title: Tasks board visual upgrade
todo.description: Improve the Tasks board: nicer cards, headers, drag handles, assignee badges, and responsive layout.
acceptance: Cards show title, assignee badge, and hover actions
Drag handle visible and works on desktop/touch

todo.title: Command palette (design + integration)
todo.description: Design and implement a command palette component (invoked by Cmd+K) that routes commands to Jarvis/Cody and displays results inline.
acceptance: Palette opens with Cmd+K and focuses input
Sends prompt to /api/cody and displays streaming response or final result
